steps.title: Substitute the value x = 50
steps.content: Replace $x$ with $50$ in $$h(x) = x + 200.$$ This gives $$h(50) = 50 + 200.$$

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content: Simplify: $$h(50) = 250.$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Substituting $50$ for $x$ in the given function yields $h\left(50\right)=50+200$, or $h\left(50\right)=250$. Therefore, the value of $h\left(50\right)$ is $250$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $h\left(0\right)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $h\left(9,800\right)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $h\left(50,000\right)$.
